category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to North Macedonia.

title.en: China-to-North Macedonia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (AEK / EU-RED)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入北马其顿：AEK / EU-RED合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入北馬其頓：AEK / EU-RED合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against North Macedonia requirements under the transposed EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU), covering CE marking with Declaration of Conformity (DoC) submitted to AEK, EMC per EN/CISPR harmonised standards, electrical safety (230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/F), EU Authorised Representative or local importer obligation, Macedonian language labelling, and GDPR-aligned cybersecurity and data-protection requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与北马其顿转化EU无线电设备指令（RED 2014/53/EU）要求的差距对照，涵盖提交AEK的CE标志合规声明（DoC）、基于EN/CISPR协调标准的电磁兼容、电气安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插头）、欧盟授权代表或本地进口商义务、马其顿语标注以及符合GDPR的网络安全与数据保护要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與北馬其頓轉化EU無線電設備指令（RED 2014/53/EU）要求的差距對照，涵蓋提交AEK的CE標誌合規聲明（DoC）、基於EN/CISPR協調標準的電磁相容、電氣安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插頭）、歐盟授權代表或本地進口商義務、馬其頓語標注以及符合GDPR的網路安全與資料保護要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, AEK type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current North Macedonia regulations, applicable EN/CISPR harmonised standards, labelling requirements, and market-entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in North Macedonia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、AEK型式核准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于北马其顿销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行北马其顿法规、适用EN/CISPR协调标准、标注要求及市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、AEK型式核准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於北馬其頓銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行北馬其頓法規、適用EN/CISPR協調標準、標注要求及市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: North Macedonia has transposed EU RED (2014/53/EU), so CE marking with a Declaration of Conformity (DoC) submitted to AEK is mandatory for wireless devices — no separate national radio type approval is required beyond the CE/DoC route. EMC must comply with EN/CISPR harmonised standards; electrical safety requires EN IEC 62368-1 for 230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F. An EU Authorised Representative or a North Macedonia-based importer must submit the DoC to AEK and maintain the technical file. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and FCC certifications are not recognised. Macedonian language labelling is required, and GDPR-aligned data-protection obligations apply to connected devices.
answer_first.zh: 北马其顿已转化EU RED（2014/53/EU），因此无线设备须强制进行CE标志认证，并向AEK提交符合性声明（DoC）——除CE/DoC路径外，无需单独的国家无线电型式核准。电磁兼容须符合EN/CISPR协调标准；电气安全须符合EN IEC 62368-1（230V/50Hz/C/F型插头）。欧盟授权代表或北马其顿本地进口商须向AEK提交DoC并维护技术文档。中国SRRC、CCC及FCC认证均不被认可。须提供马其顿语标注，连接设备须遵守符合GDPR的数据保护义务。
answer_first.zht: 北馬其頓已轉化EU RED（2014/53/EU），因此無線裝置須強制進行CE標誌認證，並向AEK提交符合性聲明（DoC）——除CE/DoC路徑外，無需單獨的國家無線電型式核准。電磁相容須符合EN/CISPR協調標準；電氣安全須符合EN IEC 62368-1（230V/50Hz/C/F型插頭）。歐盟授權代表或北馬其頓本地進口商須向AEK提交DoC並維護技術文件。中國SRRC、CCC及FCC認證均不被認可。須提供馬其頓語標注，聯網裝置須遵守符合GDPR的資料保護義務。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on major AEK / EU-RED regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed requires named reviewer sign-off.
